full_text:
Emperor Wu of Han [Liu Che] (Tong) 武皇帝[劉彻] (通)
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Emperor Wu of Han [Liu Che] (武皇帝[劉彻]), styledTong (通). Han dynasty. Seventh emperor. Ruled from from 141–87 BC. Emperor Wu of Han [Liu Che] was affiliated with the Han Dynasty. Emperor Wu of Han [Liu Che] lived during the Former Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
